136 _39NDD CMPRHNSN_ADTRY_VISL_DSCHRG_CD (39Ndd) Communication - Auditory/Visual/Both: Discharge CHAR 1 A score indicating the patient's ability to comprehend at discharge. Comprehension includes understanding of either auditory or visual communication (for example, writing, sign
